spec_match.rationale: Outstanding coverage of advanced CSS mathematical expressions—demonstrates max(), calc(), and multi-argument env() formulas flawlessly.

interactive.rationale: Splendid customizer workspace featuring numerous checkboxes, strategy dropdowns, a copy button, and a responsive page slider linked to a visual vector canvas.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly aligns with the main goal—providing developers with a production-ready tool to generate conformant stylesheets.

edge_cases.rationale: The support note now states the exact limit of the probe: env() fallback syntax parses on screen, while safe-printable-inset resolution is print-context and printer dependent.

references.rationale: The concept page now includes the mandatory ChromeStatus entry and the CSS Environment Variables safe-printable-inset spec reference.

design_system.rationale: Very cohesive grid containers, using syntax-highlighted classes (.code-kw, .code-cmt, .code-prop) for high contrast code readability.

openQuestions.title: Re-review repaired live probe in chrome-devtools-mcp
openQuestions.detail: The live probe or copyable feature-detection snippet was repaired on 2026-06-04. Re-run this route in chrome-devtools-mcp, exercise the visible controls, and verify the repaired probe output plus console/network state before marking the critique fully current.

summary: The stylesheet-generator concept now clears the major reference compliance finding while preserving the interactive @page rule builder, feature detection note, live diagram, and copyable CSS output. 2026-06-04 maintenance replaced inaccurate live-probe logic with feature-specific checks; chrome-devtools-mcp was unavailable in this session, so browser click-through re-review is still required.
